prompt: I have three credit card statements: AmEx business card, Chase personal card, and a Visa. They're in /Statements/Personal/You/Credit_Cards/ and /Statements/Business-You/Credit_Cards/. Can you process all of them and learn their formats? I want to make sure they're organized correctly.

assertions.text: Multi-format learning - Correctly learns and distinguishes AmEx/Chase/Visa simultaneously
assertions.evidence: With-skill processes all three with 97-99% confidence; without-skill provides working implementation

assertions.text: Credit card columns - Captures cardholder, transaction type, category, rewards fields
assertions.evidence: Format mappings show credit card-specific metadata for each card type

assertions.text: Batch processing - Efficiently processes all three without separate runs
assertions.evidence: With-skill: 670ms for learning, 135ms cached; without-skill: demonstrates batch capability

assertions.text: Correct organization - Statements in correct folders (Personal/Business)
assertions.evidence: Organization confirmed for all three cards in correct folder structure

assertions.text: 100% parsing success - All 27 transactions across three cards parsed
assertions.evidence: 27/27 transactions successfully parsed with zero errors
